go final homestead entries. The total

John Anderson, who keeps the quick
lunch cafe at S23 sprague avenue,
took exception to M. P. Barnham and
the latter's friend. ]. Welch, enjoy
ing dinner at the expense of the res
taurant last night. AS a result of the
misunderstanding the two diners
spent last night in Jail.

Spokane for 20 years. He namef as

Said Barnham:


The Club Cafe always In the lead
Our 25c merchants lunch with beer
or wine from 1870 to 2 p. m. as good
as ever. Headquarters for steaks,

II met my friend, Mr.. WEIGH, last
evening and invited him to go witt
me into the restaurant and have din
ner. I thought / had $40 note in
my pocketbook at the time, but must
| have lost the money. The restaurant
man promptly had us arrested when
1 could not pay the 40 cents that was
| due him, and both myself and my
guest have since been in Jail. want
ed to telephone to some of my friends
to come down and get me out, but the
police said prisoners were not allow
ed to use the telephone The position
Is most embarrassing for me-"
